bull_case: AAVE trades at 15.2x P/S, 17% below peer median, with $182M annualized real lending revenue accelerating.
TVL of $42.3B (+45% YoY) and 59.79% DeFi lending market share signal dominant network entrenchment.
$50M/yr Anti-GHO buyback plus 19.6k stkAAVE holders ($269M staked) create durable deflationary token mechanics.
bear_case: Legal exposure flag active with 2 serious legal events; TRUST_TIER_3 team rating introduces governance and regulatory risk.
Rising CEX reserves (2.23M tokens) and contributor exodus (Chaos Labs, BGD, ACI) threaten short-term sell pressure and development continuity.
Single-point-of-failure Chainlink oracle dependency across all deployments; a feed manipulation could trigger cascading liquidations.
invalidation_conditions: TVL drops below $30B within 60 days, signaling structural capital flight from the protocol.
A confirmed smart contract exploit or oracle manipulation causes >$50M in user losses within any 30-day window.
AAVE P/S ratio expands above 22x within 90 days without corresponding revenue growth, eliminating the valuation discount thesis.
monitoring_checklist: Weekly TVL trend on Aave V3/V4 across all chains — flag if 4-week rolling decline exceeds 15%.
CEX reserve balance of AAVE tokens — alert if reserves rise above 2.8M tokens, indicating accelerating distribution.
GHO revenue contribution and Anti-GHO buyback execution — verify $1M/week buyback cadence and GHO supply growth monthly.
